title: NotebookLM Image Mission
description: Mission to plan an image with AI!

scenes.speech: Visual Agent! This time it's 'Image Operation'! 🖼️
scenes.title: Mission Directive: Image Operation
scenes.content: Task: Use NotebookLM to organize your image ideas and create an 'image generation prompt' for AI!

scenes.speech: To create an image with AI, you need a 'detailed description'!
scenes.title: What is an Image Prompt?
scenes.content: A prompt is a description that tells an AI image generation tool to 'create an image like this'. The more detailed, the better the image!
scenes.highlight:
3 elements of a good prompt:
① Who (main character)
② Where (location/background)
③ What kind of atmosphere (color/mood)

scenes.speech: Let's explain the picture you want to create to NotebookLM and have it create a prompt for you!
scenes.title: Prompt Creation Operation
scenes.content: Open NotebookLM, describe the image you want to create, and let it create a prompt for you!
scenes.highlight:
Usable prompt:
'Create a text for an elementary school student to ask an image generation AI.
The theme is 'Future School',
and the atmosphere is bright and fun.'

scenes.speech: Let's actually generate an image using the prompt you created!
scenes.title: Image Generation Challenge
scenes.content: Try generating an image with your family using an image generation AI and the prompt you created!
scenes.highlight:
Clear conditions:
□ Idea organization completed
□ 1 image prompt completed
□ Revised at least once

scenes.title: Image Organization
scenes.content: Sort images into folders by theme, and put dates or content in the filename. They become a searchable treasure.
scenes.highlight:
3 rules:
- Group by theme
- Content in name
- Date in name

scenes.title: Caption Challenge
scenes.content: Captions deepen understanding. Add 'feeling' more than 'facts' and the caption sticks.
scenes.highlight:
Great caption:
- Short
- Feeling
- A touch of surprise

scenes.speech: Image Operation completed! Submit your prompt and image to get 320 points! 🎯
scenes.title: Mission Completed!
scenes.content: You've acquired the power of an AI artist! Submit your prompt and generated image to Slack!
